name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Classification Protocol
governing_principle: The protocol governs how posture is assigned; it does not automate judgment. A protocol outcome is a bounded evidence-posture statement, not a verdict about truth, authenticity, people, institutions, or events.

stages.name: Artifact Boundary Identification
stages.purpose: Identify the discrete artifact or evidence chain being reviewed.
required_checks: Is the artifact distinct from the subject connected to it?
possible_stop_conditions: no discrete artifact identified — use not_assessable_posture

stages.name: Subject Separation Check
stages.purpose: Ensure the protocol does not transfer artifact risk to a connected subject.
required_checks: Does the artifact depict, reference, or imply an identifiable subject?
Is all output language bounded to the artifact?
Does the output avoid intent, guilt, deception, misconduct, or involvement language?
possible_stop_conditions: subject separation cannot be preserved — no posture output issued

stages.name: Source Record Review
stages.purpose: Review whether the source record is visible, bounded, or missing.
required_checks: Is the source appropriate to the claim?
Is source confidence limited or sufficient?

stages.name: Provenance Visibility Review
stages.purpose: Assess origin, custody, publication path, or source-chain visibility.
required_checks: Is chain of custody visible where relevant?

stages.name: Contextual Stability Review
stages.purpose: Assess whether surrounding context is stable enough for bounded interpretation.
required_checks: Is context stable enough for bounded reliance?

stages.name: Forensic Coherence Review
stages.purpose: Review coherence signals without turning them into conclusions.
required_checks: Are coherence questions described as questions rather than proof?

stages.name: Evidence Chain Continuity Review
stages.purpose: Determine whether the artifact is supported by a stable chain of records.

stages.name: Corroboration Posture Review
stages.purpose: Review whether supporting signals exist, are absent, partial, or conflicting.

stages.name: Standard Mapping
stages.purpose: Map reviewed conditions to the Evidence Posture Standard.
required_checks: Which posture sufficiency rule is satisfied?
possible_stop_conditions: required taxonomy or standard mapping is missing

stages.name: Posture State Selection
stages.purpose: Select one bounded posture state from the taxonomy.
required_checks: Does the selected state match a taxonomy state?
Does the selected state satisfy standard sufficiency rules?
Is the most bounded responsible state chosen when multiple appear possible?
Is not_assessable_posture preferred over speculation when information is missing?
possible_stop_conditions: no valid taxonomy state satisfies standard requirements

stages.name: Output Boundary Composition
required_checks: Does output avoid verdict, score, and accusation language?
possible_stop_conditions: output would imply accusation or verdict

stages.name: Final Governance Check
stages.purpose: Ensure the output complies with governance before use.
required_checks: Does it stay within artifact posture?
Does it avoid planned capability as existing service?
Does it follow taxonomy and standard?
Does it avoid public tool implication before an engine exists?
possible_stop_conditions: governance check fails — no output issued

selection_conditions: context stable enough for bounded reliance
state_selection_rules.boundary_statement: Does not mean verified as fact, authentic, complete, legally verified, or final.

selection_conditions: at least one supporting signal exists
one or more posture dimensions remain incomplete or unresolved
state_selection_rules.boundary_statement: Does not imply falsity, deception, or unreliability as a whole.
Does not establish manipulation, bad faith, fraud, or deception.
Does not determine the occurrence verdict of the event.

selection_conditions: issue described as coherence question not proof
state_selection_rules.boundary_statement: Does not imply synthetic generation, falsity, or fraud.

selection_conditions: multiple dimensions contain unresolved risk signals
state_selection_rules.boundary_statement: Does not accuse any person, institution, brand, organization, or event. Does not prove deception, guilt, fraud, misconduct, or involvement.

selection_conditions: available information insufficient for responsible classification
state_selection_rules.boundary_statement: Not assessable is not suspicious by itself.
Planned is not live. Mention is not capability.

stop_conditions: no discrete artifact or evidence chain exists
available information insufficient and not_assessable language is not safe
output would claim future capability as active
required taxonomy or standard mapping is missing

minimum_output_shape.artifact_scope: Bounded description of artifact or evidence chain reviewed
minimum_output_shape.posture_reason_summary: Brief bounded reason for state selection
minimum_output_shape.prohibited_interpretations: What the output must not be read as
minimum_output_shape.notes: Future output shape only. Not an active public tool.

prohibited_outputs: This confirms the event did not happen.
